name: Meatball & Zucchini Italiano
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ground beef, bread crumbs, onion, celery, half teaspoon garlic salt and red pepper. Shape into 12 balls and brown in a large, heavy, nonstick skillet over medium heat.
2. Pour off drippings. Break up tomatoes; add to skillet with three-quarters cup water, beef bouillon granules and remaining half teaspoon garlic salt. Bring to boil; reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 15 minutes.
3. Dissolve cornstarch in remaining quarter cup water. Stir cornstarch mixture and zucchini into skillet with meatballs and continue cooking, covered, for 5 minutes.
4. Serve over cooked pasta.
